title: Miraculous Ladybug
description: The Miraculous LadyBug mod adds Kwami to the game. Kwami can be used to transform into heroes. Each miracle has its own special power that will help you, the power of the tigress: influence when using the force , an explosion occurs.
body:
🐞 Miraculous LadyBug Mod 🐞

🔧 Requirements

OptiFine — REQUIRED

🐞
Miraculous LadyBug Mod
🐞

The Miraculous LadyBug Mod adds Kwamis to the game, allowing players to transform into heroes from the Miraculous universe.

✨ Each Miraculous has its own unique special power that will help you in the game.
For example, the Tiger Miraculous creates an explosion when its force ability is used.

⚠️ OptiFine installation is REQUIRED!


📦 Current Miraculouses

✅ — Completed | ⏳ — In development

Ladybug Miraculous ✅

Cat Miraculous ✅

Gimmi Miraculous ✅

Bee Miraculous ✅

Rabbit Miraculous ✅

Goat Miraculous ✅

Rooster Miraculous ✅

Horse Miraculous ✅

Monkey Miraculous ✅

LadyDragon ✅

🧰 A Ladybug Miracle Box has also been added to the game.

🔧 Requirements
OptiFine — REQUIRED
